content.full_text:
November 5, 1990

Fair Political Practices Commission
Legal Division
428 J Street, Suite 800
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804

Attention: Jeanette Turvill, Political Reform Consultant

Gentlemen/Madam:

The Butte County Board of Supervisors has scheduled a public hearing on Tuesday, December 18, 1990 at 9:45 a.m. to consider the amendment of the County's Conflict of Interest Code pursuant to Government Code Section 87306.

A copy of the proposed amendment which includes the incorporation page, attachments of designated employees and members, disclosure categories, designation of place of filing, and Regulation 18730 is enclosed.

Please review the proposed amendment, and let our office know whether or not it is acceptable prior to the public hearing. If you desire further information, please contact Carol Roach, Assistant Clerk of the Board of Supervisors, at 916-538-7643. Thank you for your assistance in this matter.

Very truly yours,

William H. Randolph
Chief Administrative Officer
